economic_ownership_map.label: Auction, ALT, and NLEX fee franchises (after corporate overhead)
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Auction, ALT, and NLEX fee franchises (after corporate overhead)
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Low/base/high change earnings power and exit multiple; not a single terminal multiple on revenue.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FACT FY2025 10-K segment op. income: Auction/Liquidation $2.671M, Refurbishment & Resale $1.659M, Brokerage (NLEX) $6.116M; corporate ($4.965M). CALC fee segments after corporate = $5.481M; after ~25% tax proxy ≈ $4.11M. JUDGMENT low/base/high ≈ 8×/10×/12× that after-tax run-rate ($0.95/$1.18/$1.42 before rounding). Q1 2026 still profitable but softer (NI $0.717M). Sources: 10-K FY2025 segment note; 10-Q Q1 2026.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Through-cycle after-tax fee earnings fall such that capitalized value is below the low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Specialty lending notes receivable
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Low/base/high vary recovery vs carrying on the notes book.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FACT Q1 2026: current notes receivable net $4.369M + non-current $4.182M = $8.551M ($0.25/sh). Specialty Lending FY2025 op. income only $0.230M. JUDGMENT haircut carrying for credit/collection risk.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence supports economics below the low case or reveals an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Equity-method investments (JVs / participating interests)
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Cases vary realizable value of JV / participating interests vs carrying.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FACT Q1 2026 carrying value $19.442M ($0.56/sh). FY2025 equity-method earnings only $0.123M (vs $2.688M in 2024). JUDGMENT: base discounts carrying for illiquidity and lumpy realizations; high near carrying after recent DLZ exit evidence.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence supports economics below the low case or reveals an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Cash, inventory, PP&E net of operating working liabilities
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Cash, inventory, PP&E net of operating working liabilities
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Low/base/high vary inventory and PP&E realization; cash near face.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FACT Q1: cash $11.566M + inventory $5.348M + AR $1.725M + PP&E $12.029M = $30.668M; less AP $5.174M + payables to sellers $5.317M + other current liab $0.896M = $11.387M → net ≈ $19.3M ($0.56/sh) before debt/leases. JUDGMENT haircut for inventory realization and PP&E specialized-use risk.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence supports economics below the low case or reveals an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Third-party debt and lease liabilities
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Cases vary paydown pace and lease run-off.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FACT Q1: non-current third-party debt $4.100M; lease liabilities current $0.818M + non-current $0.619M = $1.437M; total ≈ $5.537M ($0.16/sh).
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence supports economics below the low case or reveals an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Series N preferred liquidation preference
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Fixed senior claim at stated preference.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FACT Q1: 563 Series N preferred shares with $1,000/share liquidation preference over common = $0.563M ($0.02/sh).
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence supports economics below the low case or reveals an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: DebtX commercial-loan brokerage platform (2026 acquisition)
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Low failure; base modest earn-in; high assumes platform approaches NLEX-like contribution over time.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FACT: Jan 1, 2026 acquired substantially all assets of The Debt Exchange Inc. for ~$8.5M (10-Q). Q1 Commercial Loans segment op. loss ($0.606M). Goodwill rose to $12.747M; intangibles to $6.066M. JUDGMENT: only incremental value beyond fee-franchise / tangible assets already counted; failure value zero if platform does not scale.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: The estimate is assessed over the five-year valuation horizon following the January 1, 2026 acquisition, rather than as immediate owner cash.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The low/base/high range explicitly assigns failure, modest earn-in, and a NLEX-like contribution path; Q1 2026 Commercial Loans operating loss supports a conservative base.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No separate owner-funded expansion capital is modeled; the $8.5M acquisition consideration is already paid and the incremental option value is after the current operating loss and asset base.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: DebtX remains loss-making and impaired below the low case (zero).

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Auction, ALT, and NLEX fee franchises (after corporate overhead)
Cash, inventory, PP&E net of operating working liabilities

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
